features.title: Configuring Commission Schemes
features.usage:
Navigate to the 'Schemes' dashboard. Click 'Create Scheme' to define new payout logic. Choose from: 
1. **Percentage**: Fixed % of deal value.
2. **Tiered Bonus**: Percentage increase after revenue milestone.
3. **Qty Threshold**: Flat bonus after selling X units.
4. **Fixed Per Unit**: Constant amount for every unit sold.
features.tips: Use the 'Max Cap' field to limit maximum payable commission per deal for risk management.

features.title: Staff Onboarding & Approval
features.usage: When new staff sign up, they appear in 'Pending Approvals'. Review their requested role and department. Once approved, assign them to a specific 'Commission Scheme' to activate their logging capabilities.
features.tips: You can change a staff member's assigned scheme at any time to reflect promotions or policy changes.

features.title: Settlement Batching
features.usage:
In the 'Batches' section, select multiple 'Earned' commissions to create a Payout Batch. This locks the records for review. 
1. **Draft**: Initial collection.
2. **Submit**: Move to manager review.
3. **Approve**: Finalize for finance processing.
features.tips: Draft batches can be edited or deleted if adjustments are needed before formal submission.

features.title: Financial Adjustments
features.usage: Use the 'Adjustments' dashboard to add manual financial corrections like performance bonuses or equipment deductions. These are automatically included in the next commission batch for the salesperson.
features.tips: Every adjustment requires a description for the audit trail.

features.title: Logging New Sales
features.usage: Click 'Log Sale' on your dashboard. Enter the Client Name, Product Details, and total Deal Value. The system immediately calculates your estimated commission based on your assigned active scheme.
features.tips: Always double-check the deal value as it directly impacts your earned commission logic.

features.title: Earnings Lifecycle Tracking
features.usage:
Monitor your deals through four stages:
1. **Earned**: Logged and valid.
2. **Batched**: Included in a pending payout.
3. **Approved**: Finalized by management.
4. **Paid**: Funds disbursed by finance.
features.tips: Use the filters to see exactly which deals are pending payment.

features.title: Performance Analytics
features.usage: The 'Overview' tab shows your Monthly Targets vs Achievement. Visual charts help you identify your best-performing products and revenue trends.
features.tips: Watch the 'Target Gap' to see how many more sales are needed to hit your next tier bonus.

features.title: Processing Payments
features.usage: Finance users see an 'Approved' queue. Select a batch and click 'Process Payment'. You can mark the entire batch as paid or perform partial payments if specific deal verification is pending.
features.tips: Marking as 'Paid' generates a unique transaction reference for the audit log.

features.title: System Audit Registry
features.usage: Access the global audit logs to view every state change (e.g., 'who changed a batch from Pending to Paid' and at what time).
features.tips: Export these logs at the end of each month for external accounting compliance.
